creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Now you have

    ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/build/*.so ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/

Files ending in .so are shared libraries, which need to be installed with INSTALL_LIB.  It's only the static libraries which need INSTALL_DATA instead.

I don'see the BUILD.bazel file that was not accounted for either.  Let's hope it doesn't fail the build test again.

Will start the build tests in a few hours as my machine is currently occupied.
